reference: I have been trying to conceive since last year but have had no luck. I had hormones and ultrasound tests done. All my follicle monitoring was done since the last cycle, and I used Clomiphene fifty mg. I had an ovulation scan on the 7th day, but there was no positive result after two days. The next scan indicated that the doctor advised a hysterosalpingography or human chorionic gonadotropin injection. Can I have details about this injection, including the cost and expected results?
text: I have been trying to conceive since last year, but have had no luck. I had hormones and ultrasound tests done. All my follicle monitoring was done since the last cycle, and I used clomiphene 50 mg. I had an ovulation on the 7th day, but there was no positive result after 2 days. The next scan indicated that the doctor advised a hysterosalpingography, or human chorionic gonadotropin injection. Can I have details about this injection? Including the cost and expected results.
